title: RepoBrief evidence context graph
goal: Build an evidence-graded coding context graph that adds precise Python caller, callee and reference navigation before measured edit-context, runtime, multilingual and build/test overlays.
completion: Python v1 emits deterministic S0/S1 relations and preserves uncertainty without guessing.
Bounded read-only caller, callee and reference consumers expose source ranges, provenance and freshness.
A fixed goldset and agent benchmark govern any default edit-context promotion.
Runtime, multilingual and build/test overlays remain separately registered evidence sources.

metadata.source_request: User requested all Symbol Call Graph work to be registered and implemented.
